sections.heading: Proposed Change
sections.text: V3.5 proposes reducing stabilization time from 3.0 seconds to 2.5 seconds. The program remains not effective for production.

sections.heading: Potential Impact
sections.text: Potential impacts are measurement bias, false-pass risk, false-fail risk and cycle-time reduction. No improvement is confirmed.

sections.heading: Validation Requirements
sections.text: Pending evidence includes MSA confirmation, master-leak verification, a 30-piece correlation study, capability confirmation and Quality approval.
